about.title: About
about.paragraph1: AU Finance Calculators is an independent project focused on practical Australian finance tools.
about.paragraph2: This website is designed as a decision-support tool to help you compare scenarios quickly and consistently.
about.paragraph3: It does not provide personal financial advice, tax advice, or legal advice.
about.paragraph4: All estimates are generated using transparent assumptions so you can review what drives the result.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: We do not collect personal information unless you voluntarily provide it, such as by emailing us for support or feedback.
privacy.p2: Calculator inputs and outputs are processed client-side in your browser.
privacy.p3: We do not sell personal information.
privacy.p4: If third-party advertising is added in the future, those providers may use cookies or similar technologies subject to their own policies.
privacy.p5: If you contact us by email, we use your message details only to respond to your inquiry.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.p1: This website is provided for informational purposes only.
terms.p2: Content and calculator outputs are not financial, tax, legal, or professional advice.
terms.p3: We do not guarantee accuracy, completeness, or suitability for your circumstances.
terms.p4: You are solely responsible for any decisions or actions you take based on this website.
terms.p5: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we exclude liability for any loss or damage arising from use of, or reliance on, this website and its outputs.

contact.title: Contact
contact.instructionsTitle: When reporting an issue, please include:
contact.i3: A clear description of the problem

novated.title: Novated Lease Calculator
novated.description: Start with Quote mode. Use Detailed mode only if you need advanced controls.
novated.statusDirty: Inputs changed. Click Calculate to refresh results.
novated.statusEditing: You are still editing. Click Calculate when ready.
novated.inputAttention: Some inputs need attention before results can be shown.
novated.taxSavingsOverTerm: Estimated tax and Medicare savings over the lease term: {value}.
novated.lineTotalTermInclResidual: Total cost over full term (incl. Residual)
novated.issueQuoteRateFallback: Your quote does not include an interest rate. We used a default estimate. Add your quote rate in Advanced for better accuracy.
novated.issueVarianceModerate: Your quote and this estimate are somewhat different. This is common when quote fees and assumptions differ.
novated.issueVarianceHigh: Your quote and this estimate are quite different. Check included fees and assumptions for a closer comparison.
novated.issueHighDeduction: The deductions look high compared with salary. Please review your inputs and assumptions.
novated.issueNegativeTaxableIncome: These inputs would reduce taxable income below zero. Please adjust salary or package amounts.
novated.disclaimer: This website and its outputs are provided for general informational purposes only and do not constitute financial, taxation, legal, or other professional advice. All calculations are estimates based on user inputs and model assumptions, may be incomplete or inaccurate, and may not reflect your personal circumstances, employer policy, lender terms, or current law. You should obtain independent professional advice before making any financial decision. To the maximum extent permitted by law, the website owner, developer, and contributors exclude all liability for any loss, damage, cost, or claim arising from use of, or reliance on, this website or its outputs.
novated.disclaimerShort: Estimates only. This calculator provides general information and is not financial, tax, or legal advice.

sources.fbtStatutory: ATO car fringe benefit taxable value (statutory formula)
sources.phevTransition: ATO plug-in hybrid electric vehicle FBT transition
sources.lctThresholds: ATO luxury car tax rates and thresholds

im.label: Input mode
im.description: Quote mode is faster. Detailed mode gives full control.

vt.label: Vehicle type
vt.description: Select the fuel or technology type.

ocr.label: Savings interest rate (optional)
ocr.description: Estimated annual return if cash stays invested.

qmp.label: Quoted monthly lease payment
qmp.description: Use the monthly amount from your quote.

rat.label: Annual running costs (total)
rat.description: Use one yearly total if breakdown is unavailable.

irc.label: Include running costs in package
irc.description: Toggle whether running costs are packaged.

qmf.label: Quoted monthly admin fee
qmf.description: Optional fee shown in the quote.

quf.label: Quoted upfront fees
quf.description: Optional total upfront fees from quote.

ICE.detail: A petrol or diesel vehicle that is not a full battery EV.

BEV.detail: A fully electric vehicle powered by a battery and motor.

PHEV.detail: A hybrid with external charging. FBT treatment can differ after 1 April 2025.

FBT.detail: Tax that can apply when an employer provides non-cash benefits, including cars.

ECM.detail: Post-tax employee contributions used to reduce or eliminate FBT taxable value.

Residual.detail: Amount due at lease end; may be paid, refinanced, or sold against.

Gross-up Factor.detail: Factor used to convert taxable value to grossed-up value in detailed FBT calculations.

loanRepayment.description: Estimate loan repayments or borrowing capacity with a simple fixed-rate amortization model.

principal.label: Loan amount
principal.hint: How much you plan to borrow.

payment.label: Payment per period
payment.hint: How much you can repay each period.

rate.label: Annual interest rate (%)
rate.hint: Nominal annual rate used for estimates.

offsetBalance.label: Offset balance
offsetBalance.hint: Balance in linked offset account used to reduce interest charged.

extraPayment.label: Extra payment per period
extraPayment.hint: Extra principal repayment added every period.

validation.principal: Enter a loan amount greater than zero.
validation.payment: Enter a payment amount greater than zero.
validation.rate: Enter an annual interest rate of 0 or higher.
validation.years: Enter a loan term greater than zero.
validation.fixInputs: Fix the highlighted inputs to view results.
validation.paymentTooLow: Payment is too low to cover interest. Increase payment, add offset, or reduce principal.
validation.offsetBalance: Enter an offset balance of 0 or higher.
validation.extraPayment: Enter an extra payment of 0 or higher.

help.offset: Interest is calculated on remaining balance minus offset balance (not below zero).
help.extraPayment: Extra payment is applied every period and reduces principal early.
help.io: In IO mode, scheduled payment is interest each period. Principal only reduces via extra payment.

note.reverseIoNotSupported: Reverse mode currently supports PI only. Switch to PI to estimate borrowing capacity.

disclaimer.general: This calculator provides estimates only and is not financial, credit, tax, or legal advice.
disclaimer.exclusion1: Interest rates are modeled as fixed over the full term.
disclaimer.exclusion2: Fees, lender charges, redraw rules, and offset product conditions are excluded.
disclaimer.exclusion3: Results are based on a per-period model and may differ from lender statements.
disclaimer.exclusion4: Always verify assumptions with your lender or licensed adviser before decisions.

incomeTax.title: Income Tax Calculator
incomeTax.subtitle: Estimate income tax, Medicare levy, net income, and employer super using selected financial year assumptions.

disclaimer.general: This calculator provides estimates only and is not tax, financial, or legal advice.
disclaimer.exclusion1: HELP/HECS and other student loans are excluded.
disclaimer.exclusion2: Offsets, deductions, and rebates are excluded.
disclaimer.exclusion3: Medicare levy surcharge and private health effects are excluded.
disclaimer.exclusion4: Super contribution caps and contribution tax are excluded.

errors.amount: Enter an amount of 0 or higher.
errors.bonusPercent: Enter a bonus percentage of 0 or higher.
errors.additionalIncome: Enter additional income of 0 or higher.
errors.salaryType: Select a valid salary input type.
errors.fixInputs: Fix the highlighted inputs to view results.
